title: Orespawn Type SHii
description: Just another crackhead mod with loads of random shit 👏👏👏
body: "Orespawn Type Shit" is a goofy ahh mod that is truely ridiculous. It adds a block called gren with a acud texture simular to the Camel block from the ohio biome as seen on the itsjim youtube channel. other shit it adds is a animated block(wich is not animated) that makes meme sfx when interacted with. theres also a biome and dimension thats just the gren block. if you have anymore stupid idea for this mod shoot me a email at info@fjox.win
